name: clickhouse
description: Connect Gemini to your ClickHouse database to query data and explore schemas.

settings.name: CLICKHOUSE_HOST
settings.description: The hostname of your ClickHouse database

settings.name: CLICKHOUSE_PORT
settings.description: The port number (e.g., 8123 for local, 8443 for Cloud)

settings.name: CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD
settings.description: Database password (input will be masked securely)
